Frostreaver  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 43
DMG: 42 Dmg Bonus: 150
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +15 DEX: +10 STA: +5 HP: +50
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +6 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +9 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Judgment of Ice (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL except ERU HIE DEF HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Frostreaver
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 43
DMG: 42 Dmg Bonus: 150
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +15 DEX: +10 STA: +5 HP: +50
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +6 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +9 SV POISON: +5
Effect: Judgment of Ice (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 12.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL SHD BER
Race: ALL except ERU HIE DEF HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Axe of Kings
Item Type:2H Slashing
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 03:06:34
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

*This item is the result of a raid event.
Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 60
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Icewell Keep
NPC Name
Dain Frostreaver IV


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Icewell Keep
Item Lore: Axe of Kings


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
Not usable by HEF, lol
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2022 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
Erekai
Sage
71 posts
I am absolutely floored that this is unusable by Half Elves, and also Dark Elves, but... it CAN be used by Wood Elves? What the?

Usable by Ogres. Dwarves. Gnomes. Frogloks. Humans. Halflings. Iksar. Vah Shir.

But not Dark Elves or Half Elves. That almost seems like that has to be an oversight, especially given that Wood Elves can use it. That blows my mind.
▲ Page top
Not usable by HEF, lol
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2023 at 3:55 AM Rating: Decent
LydiusInsidious
Scholar
108 posts
Back before WoW forced every MMO into this meta/tier crap, it used to be VERY lore based and thus items indeed were very class/race/deity specific.

Not so much today, very generalized, tiered crap.

QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760453644
6 posts
I was on a dain raid today and 3 of these dropped and only 2 people could use, so quickly i gated and camped, created a level 1 human paladin, attacked paladin guildmaster ran to pok, and went through great divide into thurg. The second i entered thurg i did a /who to see who was there. I got a DMF from a 65 necro and a hp buff from a druid. I zoned into icewell, ran up the stars floated down the well, and looted this awesome axe. Yay

#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 01 2004 at 4:04 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) maffiosso, ur a frekin newb, the pally epic before they nerfed it was as good as " the sword of truth " i mean, seriously, pally epic / frostreaver both own, personally, i like frostreaver cuz it has awesome graphic, but so does pally epic, oh, other thing, WINDBLADE BLOWS AT HIGH LVL!!!! epics were made to always be used and not to be non-used over a stupid frekin windy....
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 28 2003 at 6:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Windblade Sucks, with no proc its useless at the high lvls. look at the Respenent War Maul(spelling error on that one), best Paly weapon in the game, not cause of the ratio or stats but because of the PROC, the ratio and stats just make it worth using on a raid and in a group.

44 posts
Just to let everyone know who isnt an Elf of any kind that this weapon is NOT usable by elfs you probley didnt even notice LOL. But as a very excited 54 SK that I was when I seen someone in Icewell /ooc FROSTREAVER ON DAIN COME GET IT!!! and AFTER looting it (not joking LOL) I find out I cant use it hahahaha. I mean WTF were they thinking not letting my wimpy little elf butt use it for huh hehe? I mean dang I was so happy I had finally got an uber 2hs to last until epic....and now cant use it. Is there ANY way someone could tell me if and HOW it might be possible to CHANGE this weapon??? Currently sitting in my bank waiting for me to use haha. Thank-You.

Frostreaver and Primal Velium Battle Axe
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2002 at 5:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255534358
1 post
As a 60 Warlord, I have the Frostreaver and Primal Velium Battle Axe and prefer the Frostreaver. I use the Primal until Avatar procs then switch to Frostreaver. For me it holds aggro better and seem to get more crits with it. Avatar lasts about 6 minutes and with 255 dex, Judgement of Ice goes off quite often. 125 direct damage (aggro raiser plus extra damage) compared to 100 agi dex str attack over and over again (last 6 minutes, most flights don't last that long and if so switch back after 5 minutes and refresh)

My thought, Frostreaver good, Primal Velium Battle Axe good, Frostreaver and Primal combo GREAT

Side note: better than war epic for everyone that thinks it is a crap weapon

▲ Page top
RE: Frostreaver and Primal Velium Battle Axe
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2003 at 1:59 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759294285

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 20 2002 at 5:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) sadly maintaining aggro for warriors is the only use for this piece of crap, any self respecting knight who's in a guild that can take down the d41n are going to have much better weapons from elsewhere..
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 19 2002 at 8:29 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ok heres how it went down. Our group 14 druid(with sow), monk (with fd), 14 cleric, 15 wizzy, 16 ranger and lvl 20 tank(with damage cap removed) just got back from tov and decided to give the dain a vist before we logged. Monk pulled the little bugger fight lasted about 2 min he had to have over 2k hp (amazing) by far tuffer than gnols in sk. but droped decent sword and a head(for some quest i guess?) anyways he isnt that hard just make sure everyone is in thier teens and you should be ok. ;)

For al you rich people out there that this is crap, not everyone is in a big strong guild and gets to raid ToV frequently. I, myself am a 56 paladin (Dorf) and the best 2H slash weapons i can get are the ones i buy in the bazaar. I currently wield an Argent Protector ( that crap? yes that crap), and i am pretty happy about it.
I dont see the use in shouting every weapon is crap just because you have a better one, or even your lvl 15 alt has a better one.

BTW name is Krovikan on AB, send a tell when you let the crap rot )P

# Nov 21 2001 at 1:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361473653
Scholar
34 posts
Leflion,

For guilds killing Dain these are sadly crap, same with the joke weapon Tormax drops. I have one on my level 16 warrior Jaradin. I'll gladly log him in and let you see it. Barrin has one on his level 2 Iksar warrior Dain tester. The day I got mine for my twink we let a level 30ish warrior jump down the well and loot the 2nd one that was on the corpse. /rude crap loots.

We have let many rot as well since it seems he likes to drop the Frostreaver quite often. Ask Algathor how many have rotted. Also the SK and Paladin swords from Yelinak end up rotting nearly every raid.

RE: no big deal
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2002 at 5:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769936913
39 posts
I'm not a warrior but after reading this post I started looking up the weapons that drop in ST. From what I saw this and the axe of kromzek kings(or whatever it's called) is just as good if not better than the primal weapons in ST. Please enlighten me as to why this weapon sucks.
▲ Page top
RE: no big deal
QuoteReply
# May 14 2002 at 3:30 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Biiig difference with primal. They all proc avatar. That's +100atk +100str +100dex +100agi. Once it procs once, you'll probably be at 255 dex so it'll just keep proccing. It increases your damage output signifigantly.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 2:05 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Was in Icewell last night and uber guild was there, they pulled Dain and killed him, piece of cake. QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2001 at 12:01 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this is a twink item compared to the stuff in ST. Infact we normaly give them to guests or twinks when we kill the dain. It has gotten a nice upgrade but is still no where close to the primal and priceless 2h weapons
▲ Page top
Not necessarily a bluff...
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2001 at 4:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
... it is entirely possible to get to Thurgadin and Icewell at very low levels. I've seen several lowbies (some under level 10) hanging around at Icewell hoping for Royal Velium Frosted armor (SP?) and the Velium Round shields - the former is nodrop, and the latter is lore and very common, so are often left to rot.

HOWEVER, I can't believe that any group would actually leave this weapon to decay... perhaps the raid group had to evac and this fellow ninja'd the loot. (Higer level uber-boss corpses last a lot longer than regular corpses, so the Raiders may not have been in a hurry to loot and this guy jumped in).
▲ Page top
RE: Not necessarily a bluff...
QuoteReply
# Nov 21 2001 at 1:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361473653
Scholar
34 posts
Gael, believe it, they do rot or are given to Mort the uber banker.

RE: Not necessarily a bluff...
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 10:08 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591759157191
View User Forum
Guru
179 posts
I have seen (SEEN, not heard about...) a level three in the Crystal caves. It's no more difficult to get to Thurgadin, than it is to get there...

Having said which, IF this is a true claim, ninja looting of something like this really should be a petitionable offense!
▲ Page top
RE: Not necessarily a bluff...
QuoteReply
# Jul 14 2002 at 11:10 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591778981579
105 posts
i once ran a level 1 warrior from freeport all the way to thurg. its very easy, but time consuming, just make sure you bind at the pirate village and your all set. then, once you get to thurg, bind again.

also, i ran a human bard, follower of rallos zek to Kael, and now she lives there. Lots of other people have done it.

so what do you do with a no drop item no one wants? let it rot.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 28 2001 at 6:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i will let you guys know how we did when we kill dain tonight. it will be: ME - twinked lvl 35 WARRIOR with a badass wurmy ( no fbss yet since i am waiting for it to be 2k at least...my friend hussled for one at that price so i can do it too.)-][ MY FRIEND who is also a twinked out lvl 30 DROOD friend( he found a bag with a cone of the mystics in it in ec...lucky him, wow.) and i know you guys think we might not handle it but we also have a backup plan. we got another player waiting for us there....a high lvl 40 ENCHANTER who will mez everything since she got mez and clarity now. now what ya think of that plan? WHOOT! she also got 145 charisma...not bad aye but she needa get more int items. she seems to only have 110 int but i dont know if that's okay. is it okay? you know it is. come on, we gonna do it anyways. i just want to be the first to post this up to let ya guys know what to expect. and please don't ks our pull k if you know what server we gonna be on. I leave you with the quote for the day:" +B ack, it's the one eyed cyclops with big teef"
RE: Dain is going down and i don't mean in that way

one **************************************************************************************************** hehe, dain is 70, how the **** do you think you can kill him with those low *** chars, you think a twink is someone with a wurmy, my 32 warrior, would sit on you, and eat you with his *******, my monk is only 12 atm and he has a KD, SoS, acrylia tunic, tarmok battlestaff, FBSS and more uber stuff, hed prolly own you...and i hope yer making a joke, because thats just funny how stupid you are

# Feb 14 2002 at 1:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758496223
55 posts
total ******** man..i've seen a lvl 60 ogre warrior fall to icewell sentinels even with a cleric backing him up...a lvl 30 would be owned in about 5 seconds flat, i dont care if u have a drood or anything..and a wurmy?! slow as hell and weight like hell. and no haste? let me tell you this ogre had duel wielding silver whips of rage (pre-nerf lore). it aint gonna happen and u will never even make it past 2 seconds against Dain. good luck, i wish u well..just get ready pay a clerry for a rez...

Mebonk shortystuff
41 warrior dwarf of Rallos Zek

Povar server

▲ Page top
RE: Dain is going down and i don't mean in that way
QuoteReply
# May 01 2002 at 7:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762086122
235 posts
I'd like to know how the 60 war fell while backed by a cleric, I've seen a 58war and 59 rogue (thats right, no healer) take sentries NP and I can handle a sentinal with cleric standing behind me no sweat. A 60 cleric, 56 ranger, and myself took a sentry and sentinal at the SAME TIME and cleric still had 35% mana at the end of the fight. One group with me as MA, a 52 cleric healing, and a 51 monk pulling took watchers w/o incidince and killed all 3 counselors in the bleachers area SIMULTANEOUSLY without breaking a sweat. Sure 2 30s and a 40 cant do **** there but it's obvious he wasnt serious. Icewell is really an easy zone for powerfull characters. Its also a GREAT place to work on plate wearing twinks... Don't expect to be able to solo there, a 60 magician has the best chance but even that is pretty futile, a small group is just fine tho, one full, balanced group (preferably one with a skilled monk to make pulls easier) can do great there with little downtime and little risk, I've NEVER had to evac and NEVER had a wipeout in the many many hours I've spent there, and little of that time was spent in raid strength.

Verantman: hey ya know what'd be t0tally awes0me?

Rangerworshipper: hmm, make a high lvl mob that cannot be killed unless peeps come up with a good solid plan and then ban them for exploiting?

Verantman: no, ***** Paladins by making thier epic s0xx0r and make the mobs j00 gotta kill to get it UBAR

Rangerworshipper: yeah, and then we make a few items better than the epic when all the Paladins are 3/4 of the way to getting their epic that s0xx0rs!

Verantman: and THEN we can make rangers have WAY better weapons than Paladins that r0xx0r, and while we're at it, lets let rangers get 2 epics!

Rangerworshipper: hmmm you arent ******** Paladins over ebough, why dont we make them have really low dmg weapons and give them all the useless skills!

*and thus the new and improved EQ Paladin is born*

Stupid teenager nerd: Hey ya kn0w what'd be totally awes0me? Spelling everything with letters instead of numbers and using stupid words.

Person who spells right: No that would be stupid.

Stupid teenager nerd: well spelling like retards r0x0x0r. Its also cool to capitalize random letters thrOuGhOUt youR s3/\/TencEs!

Person who spells right: Maybe your monitor will explode and all the pixels will go in your teeth.

Stupid teenager nerd: U suX0R

Person who spells right: Cool.

If you worship rangers, you need a real life. While you think paladins suck, i think you're just staring at some computer screen, and all you're ranger is is a file on some verant computer..

Everquest is cool but rangerworshipper isnt. Why do you post anon anyway.

One final note for you anonymousman, it's UBER NOT UBAR. What an idiot.

A 5 month old file

# Apr 11 2001 at 9:12 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Actually, in D&D the most FEARED race tend to be the drow. This is because everybody knows about their evil ways.

The most DEADLY race, however, is the duergar (dark dwarves). They're secretive, diabolical, and most importantly, they can work together to get things done. As an example, in the Forgotten Realms, the duergar are one of the only races that unnerve the drow (the other being Mind Flayers).
